title: Verify metadata-first report history and status
preconditions: Retained history contains multiple periods, Restatement chains, deletion events, and backup evidence at list limits.
steps: Get known, unknown, and deleted identities; list with bounded filters; verify ordering and payload exclusion; request over-limit output; inspect Status before and after read failures.
expected: Get, List, and Status return exact immutable or metadata-only results, stable ordering and errors, no financial list/status payload, and no state mutation.
